name: freelancer
description: Turn Claude into a freelance business partner. Proposals, scoping, client communication, invoicing follow-ups, rate negotiations, and project retrospectives — built for solopreneurs and independent consultants.

skills.name: proposal-writer
skills.description: Generate conversion-focused proposals from job postings, briefs, or intake notes

skills.name: client-comms
skills.description: Draft any client message with the right tone — updates, pushback, bad news, testimonial requests

skills.name: scope-of-work
skills.description: Create professional SOW documents with deliverables, timelines, pricing, and exclusions

skills.name: invoice-followup
skills.description: Escalating payment reminders calibrated to how overdue the invoice is

skills.name: project-retro
skills.description: Generate lessons doc, portfolio case study, and pricing intelligence from completed projects

skills.name: rate-negotiation
skills.description: Handle pricing objections, set rates, and raise prices confidently
